content: Jemaa el-Fnaa is best captured right after sunset. Use a wide-angle lens to document the vibrant night market and follow the aroma of grilled skewers to stall number 18 for an authentic experience.

Take vibrant portrait shots in front of the iconic cobalt blue walls of Majorelle Garden. Relax along the peaceful bamboo pathways and enjoy the contrast between the lush greenery and the striking architecture.

Explore the lavish rooms of 19th-century Moroccan nobility at Bahia Palace. Admire the 'brilliance' of the intricate ceiling decorations and the sophisticated Zellij tile patterns throughout the courtyards.

Feel the historical essence of Marrakech around the 70m tall Koutoubia minaret. As the city's tallest structure, it serves as a spiritual landmark and a perfect reference point for navigating the Medina.
Discover the solemn beauty and geometric perfection of the Ben Youssef Madrasa. The symmetry of the central courtyard and the carved cedar wood details provide a stunning backdrop for photography.

Enjoy the thrill of bargaining in Souk Semmarine, the heart of the Medina. Look for high-quality leather bags, traditional babouche shoes, and colorful lanterns while navigating the bustling market stalls.

If you prefer a stress-free shopping experience, visit Ensemble Artisanal. This complex offers high-quality handicrafts at fixed prices, showcasing the best of Moroccan craftsmanship without the need for bargaining.

Taste authentic Moroccan cuisine at Al Fassia, a renowned restaurant run entirely by women. Their lamb and prune tagine is a must-try, offering a perfect balance of sweet and savory traditional flavors.

Join the locals for a traditional Friday lunch at Naima Couscous. Experience the warmth of Moroccan hospitality while enjoying a perfectly steamed, hearty plate of couscous topped with fresh vegetables.

Escape the noise of the busy Medina and find tranquility at Le Jardin Secret. Relax with a cup of Moroccan mint tea on the rooftop terrace while overlooking the lush, hidden gardens and the city skyline.
